task_completion.description: Identify the target coordinates from the Astronomer's Telegrams
task_completion.visual_evidence: A document viewer showing the telegram with the coordinates for FRB 2024exq, or telescope control software with the coordinates (RA ~5.53h or 05h 31m 58.7s, Dec ~33.15 deg or +33d 08m 52.5s) entered.

task_completion.description: Slew the telescope to the target coordinates
task_completion.visual_evidence: Telescope control software (e.g., KStars/Ekos) showing the mount's current position matching the target coordinates, or a sky map centered on the target location.

task_completion.description: Conduct the specified deep imaging sequence and save to the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: An imaging queue in the software showing 3x120s Luminance (Slot 1), 3x120s R-band (Slot 4), and 3x300s H-alpha (Slot 5) frames, or a file manager showing the captured image files in /home/ga/Images/FRB2024exq/.

task_completion.description: Produce a 0.1 degree FOV finding chart with the 'cool' palette
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing the execution of ~/capture_sky_view.sh with arguments for 0.1 FOV and 'cool' palette, or a file manager/image viewer showing finding_chart_cool.png in /home/ga/Images/FRB2024exq/.

task_completion.description: Provide a status report with target name, decimal coordinates, and total frames
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing the contents of ~/Documents/frb_optical_status.txt, containing 'FRB 2024exq', RA ~5.53297, Dec ~33.1479, and a total of 9 frames.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used actual astronomy software for slewing and imaging
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with telescope control software (like KStars/Ekos) rather than just terminal commands mocking the output files.

integrity.description: Verify the finding chart was generated using the provided script
integrity.visual_evidence: A terminal window should show the execution of ~/capture_sky_view.sh, rather than the agent manually downloading or creating an image through other means.

integrity.description: Verify the status report was created by the agent
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor should show the agent actively writing or saving the frb_optical_status.txt file with the correct calculated decimal coordinates and frame count.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: FRB 2024exq. Expected Coordinates: RA 5.53297 hours (05h 31m 58.7s), Dec 33.1479 degrees (+33d 08m 52.5s). Filter Slots: Luminance (1), R-band (4), H-alpha (5). Total frames to capture: 9. Output directory: /home/ga/Images/FRB2024exq/. Finding chart path: /home/ga/Images/FRB2024exq/finding_chart_cool.png. Report path: /home/ga/Documents/frb_optical_status.txt.
